name: Wisconsin Auto Finance
description_short: Wisconsin Auto Title Loans offers fast title loans up to $15,000 and signature installment loans up to $1,500 with same-day funding at their Milwaukee location.
description_long:
Wisconsin Auto Title Loans, Inc. operates a physical storefront at 6863-65 North 76th Street in Milwaukee, WI, serving customers seeking rapid access to cash. The company is part of a larger network with multiple locations across Wisconsin, accessible through their primary website at wisconsinautotitleloansinc.com. Their business model centers on asset-backed lending using vehicle titles as collateral, a common practice in the emergency lending space.

The company offers three primary loan products: online title loans, in-person title loans up to $15,000, and signature installment loans up to $1,500. Their marketing emphasizes speed and accessibility, with messaging focused on "Fast Cash Today" and a described "Quick & Easy Online Application Process." They accept online applications with vehicle information (year, make, model) and provide both digital and in-person options for loan origination. Applicants can also make payments through their online portal.

Wisconsin Auto Title Loans distinguishes itself through multi-channel access—offering both online and physical location-based services—and relatively transparent disclosure requirements. Their website includes tabs for rates, fees, and terms, consumer disclosures, and FAQ sections specific to each loan type. They provide electronic document delivery with explicit consent mechanisms and maintain a customer service line (800-922-8803) for inquiries and consent withdrawal.

As a title loan provider, the company operates in a sector with inherently high costs to consumers. While they offer legitimate regulated lending, title loans typically carry substantially higher APRs than traditional personal loans, and borrowers risk vehicle repossession if unable to repay. The $15,000 maximum for title loans and $1,500 cap on signature installment loans reflect typical emergency lending constraints. No specific APR ranges, fees, or repayment terms are disclosed on the accessible website content, requiring customers to contact the business directly or review their rates/fees page.
pros: Fast funding available with same-day processing capability for emergency situations
Multiple loan types offered (title loans, online title loans, signature installment loans) for different financial situations
Title loans up to $15,000 provide higher borrowing capacity than typical payday loans
Multiple access channels: online application, in-person Milwaukee location, and phone support
Explicit electronic consent and disclosure mechanisms showing regulatory compliance awareness
FAQ sections for each loan type indicating customer education focus
Extended hours (10AM-6PM weekdays, 9AM-1PM Saturday) for working customers
Online payment portal for account management convenience
cons: Title loans require vehicle collateral, creating repossession risk if unable to repay
No specific APR, fees, or repayment terms disclosed on accessible website—requires direct contact
Signature installment loans capped at only $1,500, limiting usefulness for larger needs
As a title lender, likely carries significantly higher APRs than personal loans or payday alternatives
Electronic disclosure consent requirement may create barriers for customers without computer/internet access despite mitigation language
best_for: Vehicle owners facing immediate cash emergencies who can afford monthly title loan payments
Borrowers who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans or personal loans due to credit history
Customers needing $1,500-$15,000 within 24 hours with asset collateral to pledge
Milwaukee-area residents preferring in-person loan processing with immediate fund disbursement
diagnosis: Wisconsin Auto Title Loans is best for Milwaukee-area vehicle owners facing genuine emergencies who can afford the high cost of title lending and risk potential repossession. The primary caveat is that title loans carry substantially higher costs than payday alternatives or personal loans; borrowers should explore credit union PALs or other 36% APR options before committing vehicle collateral.
services: Online title loan applications and processing
Fast cash funding with same-day or next-day processing
Online payment portal for loan repayment
Customer service via phone (800-922-8803) and email
FAQ resources for each loan product type
